titleStmt.title: SII 10.115: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 115. (A.R. No. 848 of 1917.) ON A WHITE MARBLE PILLAR SET UP IN THE SAME TEMPLE. Ś. 1066. (13th year of Kulōttuṅga-Chōḍa II.)

summary.p: States that Kōṭa Kommiseṭṭi a Vaiśya of the Nābela-gōtra entrusted to the three hundred sānis of Ghaṇṭaśāla alias Chōḍa-Pāṇḍyapuram the sum of 10 Rājarāja-māḍas for maintaining two perpetual lamps in the temple of Jaladhīśvara in the said town.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śakava
rṣa 1066 nēṇṭi śrī kulōttu
nggacōḍadēvara vijayarā
jyadivyasamvatsaramulu 13 śrāhi U
ttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntinimittamuna penu
goṁḍaśāsanu veṁgina vaiśyuṁḍu nābelagō
truṁḍu gōṭakommiseṭṭi tama tallidaṁḍrulu vi
yamaseṭṭikiṁ bammamakuṁ danakunu dharmmu
vugā ghaṁṭaśāla yayna cōḍavāṁḍyavura
muna śrījaladhīśvaramahādēvara dakṣiṇō
ttaramulaṁ beṭṭina yakhaṁḍadīpamulu reṁ
ṭikinindula sānimunnūrvvuravasamunaṁ be
ṭṭina rājarājamāḍalu vadi Ī padimāḍa
luṁ jēkoni sāniyamāna nitya reṁḍumāna
lu neyi yacaṁdrārkkamu saṁttānakrama
munaṁ bōsi naḍapaṁggalavāru Ī dharmmuvu
na karamu nūṭayibbaṁḍruṁdā rarasi rakṣiṁ
paṁgalavāru .
matalakaṭiṁpagā śakasama
ṁbulu darkkarasāṁbarēṁdusammitamuga nu
ttarāyaṇanimittamunaṁ datibhaktiṁ bārvvatī
hitunaku ghaṁṭaśāla jaladhīśvaradēvara kādi mū
rtti kānatanuracakravarttiki manaḥprabhavāriki
ṁ jaṁdramauḷikin . [1 .*] dha varddhana sudhāka
ruṁ ḍeṟṟamase vanajāyatā
kṣi yanaṁgāṁ dagu putruṁḍai
tanakunu dallidaṁḍrula vugāṁbenu
ṁgoṁḍaśāsanuṁḍa gōṭakomma
na guṇāḍhyu trayin . [2 .*]
Ā puraharunaku valapala ḍāpala śāśvata
mu lai beḍagaḍaraṁgā dīpimpaṁga vēṁginaku
ladīpakuṁ ḍai reṁḍakhaṁḍadīpamu licceN [. 3 .*]
Ī giriśudakṣiṇōttarabhāgamula naharnni
śamuluṁ bāyaka veluṁgunu śrī gu
ṇamaṇi bhūṣaṇa rāgamutōṁ
gōrīdhava [.] [4 .*] likhitaṁ
dēvācāryyasya
Digital edition of SII 10.115 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
